demographics.living_situation: lives at home with her spouse; usually independent walking with a frame

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I slipped in the hallway, and now my hip and back are completely locked in agonising pain; I can't even sit up. (Spouse on the phone: she's still on the floor and I can't get her up.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: She had a fall a few hours ago and now she can't move at all or bear any weight — the pain in her hip and back is unbearable and we don't know what to do.

symptom_narrative.onset: about three hours ago, straight after a fall in the hallway
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for about three hours and not easing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says it's agonising, the worst pain she's ever had, and she can't move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right groin and hip, and across the middle of her back
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — she has to lie completely still on the floor
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to move the leg, sit up or roll over
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: she looks pale and sweaty and is shaking; she can't put any weight on the leg at all
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she broke her wrist in a fall about five years ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: completely stuck on the floor; normally she gets around independently with a walking frame

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: very thin, weak bones diagnosed years ago (osteoporosis)
past_medical_history.how_managed: was on a bone tablet but stopped it a couple of years ago

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: broke her wrist in a fall about five years ago
her back has become very rounded and hunched over the years and she has lost height

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives at home with her spouse, who is present and made the call; the house is cold and there is a loose rug in the hallway where she fell

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says she is very pale and sweaty, shaking, and in agony on the hallway floor and cannot be moved
objective_data_offered.timing: now, about 3 hours after the fall

objective_data_offered.value: she cannot put any weight on the right leg or get up off the floor at all

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's estimate / from home scales, not measured this visit

objective_data_offered.value: she is lying on a cold hard floor and has been there roughly three hours; a loose rug is at the spot where she slipped
